About Me
Senior Software Engineer,
building at scale.
9+ years across the full SDLC, currently on the Revenue Reporting application team at JPMorgan Chase — turning complex data and infrastructure problems into reliable, production-grade systems.
My Story
I'm a backend-focused engineer who enjoys the full lifecycle of building software — from designing services to shipping them reliably in production. My core stack is Java (Spring Boot, Hibernate, REST/SOAP services) alongside Python (Flask, SQLAlchemy, Pandas, NumPy) for data-heavy work.

I'm AWS Certified Developer — Associate, and spend a lot of my time hands-on with S3, EC2, and EKS, plus Terraform for infrastructure as code. One of the projects I'm proudest of is a Hadoop-to-cloud migration built on Apache NiFi and Databricks — modernizing a legacy data pipeline into something scalable and cloud-native.
